top_findings.title: Data loading package missing from archive — cannot verify CSV loading from data/kaggle/
top_findings.evidence: cmd/brsoccer-mcp/main.go:8-9 imports brsoccer/internal/data; main.go:16 calls data.Load(*dataDir). All source files reference data.DB, data.Match, data.Player, data.TeamMatches, data.NormalizeTeam — but internal/data/ directory does not exist in archive. defect_rate=1.0 from retort.db confirms build succeeded during original run.
top_findings.suggestion: Ensure internal/data package is included in archived workspace; the data loading logic and CSV parsing cannot be verified without it

top_findings.title: Archived workspace missing internal/data package — code cannot compile from archive
top_findings.evidence: internal/ contains only mcp/ and query/ directories; no data/ directory. All 10 Go files import brsoccer/internal/data (types: DB, Match, Player; functions: TeamMatches, NormalizeTeam, Load). go.sum also missing. Archive cannot reproduce build.
top_findings.suggestion: Archive process should preserve all source packages including internal/data/ and go.sum
